headline: Assessing McKesson (MCK) Valuation As Dividend And Earnings Growth Expectations Draw Focus
summary: McKesson (MCK) is back in focus after its board declared a regular quarterly dividend of US$0.82 per share, as investors watch for the company’s upcoming fourth quarter earnings report. See our latest analysis for McKesson. Despite recent attention on the dividend and upcoming earnings, McKesson’s share price has eased in the short term, with a 1-day share price return of a 1.55% decline and a 30-day share price return of a 5.45% decline, while longer term total shareholder returns of 20.26%...
